CustomField.description: Updated formula using Subsidiary field as part of BIZ-47396.
CustomField.formula: Account.IntApp_Account_Number__c + IF(CONTAINS(TEXT(Subsidiary__c), ":") && LEFT(TEXT(Subsidiary__c), FIND(":", TEXT(Subsidiary__c)) - 1) <> "01", ":" & LEFT(TEXT(Subsidiary__c), FIND(":", TEXT(Subsidiary__c)) - 1), "" )
CustomField.label: Intapp Account Number With Subsidiary
